data.body:
FLASHデジタル写真集、貝賀琴莉「君の知らないワタシ」で見せる驚きのギャップと究極の美。清楚な少女から大人の女性へと変貌を遂げる瞬間を凝縮したグラビアの決定版は、未公開の魅力が満載されたファン必携のデジタル写真集。 - book紹介
いつも見ているはずの笑顔の裏側に、まだ誰も触れたことのない情熱や、静かな色気が隠されているとしたら。私たちはその「知らない」という事実に、抗いがたい憧れと興奮を覚えずにはいられません。貝賀琴莉という類...

data.body: It’s important not to let them pin this all on Trump, in the same way it’s important not to let them pin Israel’s crimes on Netanyahu. Everything we are seeing with this disastrous Iran war is the product of the entire power structure which gave rise to it, not one guy’s dopey decisions.
data.author: did:plc:axwvargaayncia6ny5sx6fvh

data.body: The warmongers in the DC swamp have been pushing war with Iran for decades. Trump is just the guy who was chosen by Zionist oligarchs and bloodthirsty empire managers to carry out the deed. He happens to be the face on the operation, but if it wasn’t him it would have been someone else.
data.author: did:plc:axwvargaayncia6ny5sx6fvh

data.body: American warmongering insanity didn’t start with Trump, and it isn’t going to end with him either. Don’t direct your rage merely at the fleeting puppets who come and go from the imperial stage as the US murder machine trudges onward. Direct it at the empire itself.
data.author: did:plc:axwvargaayncia6ny5sx6fvh
